title: oxydectes coriacea
intro: Oxydectes coriacea, also known as the leatherjacket plant, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa and Madagascar. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is known to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally or applied topically to aid in healing.
